image:image.image:title: Ellis-Joyce Blog - It’s Worse Than You Think: Please Stop Eating Animals - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: Whatever it is, the way you tell your story online can make all the difference.

image:image.image:title: Ellis-Joyce Blog - It’s Worse Than You Think: Please Stop Eating Animals - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: Whatever it is, the way you tell your story online can make all the difference.

image:image.image:title: Ellis-Joyce Blog - It’s Worse Than You Think: Please Stop Eating Animals - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: Whatever it is, the way you tell your story online can make all the difference.

image:image.image:title: Ellis-Joyce Blog - It’s Worse Than You Think: Please Stop Eating Animals - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: Whatever it is, the way you tell your story online can make all the difference.

image:image.image:title: Ellis-Joyce Blog - It’s Worse Than You Think: Please Stop Eating Animals - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: The world has enough space for all of us. If we make a simple choice, we can preserve the beauty of the Earth. My image, hoary marmot, Mt. Rainier, Washington

image:image.image:title: Ellis-Joyce Blog - It’s Worse Than You Think: Please Stop Eating Animals - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: The spectacular Gunnison Sage Grouse is the most recent victim of ecosystem collapse in America’s grasslands as a result of the demands of animal agriculture. Image credited to US DoI

image:image.image:title: Ellis-Joyce Blog - It’s Worse Than You Think: Please Stop Eating Animals - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: Egrets, once again widespread, were once on the verge of extinction because they were hunted for their beautiful white feathers. Conservation efforts saved them. Can we stop bad practices without legal intervention? My image, great egret on the Potomac River

image:image.image:title: Ellis-Joyce Blog - It’s Worse Than You Think: Please Stop Eating Animals - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: Vegan food is healthier on the whole, but it doesn’t have to be any less indulgent. My image, Brammibal’s Donuts

image:image.image:title: Ellis-Joyce Blog - It’s Worse Than You Think: Please Stop Eating Animals - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: Cooking vegan food is not hard, it’s just a new skill to learn. My image, Shisomen Vegan Ramen

image:image.image:title: Ellis-Joyce Blog - It’s Worse Than You Think: Please Stop Eating Animals - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: Is this the world we want? Nebraska used to have thriving woodlands and grasslands. We killed billions of animals (and many humans) so we could eat more cows. In a vegan world, 80% of the wilderness could return. Image credited to Markus Spiering

image:image.image:title: Ellis-Joyce Blog - It’s Worse Than You Think: Please Stop Eating Animals - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: Whatever it is, the way you tell your story online can make all the difference.

image:image.image:title: Ellis-Joyce Blog - It’s Worse Than You Think: Please Stop Eating Animals - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: Whatever it is, the way you tell your story online can make all the difference.

image:image.image:title: Ellis-Joyce Blog - It’s Worse Than You Think: Please Stop Eating Animals - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: All animals are beautiful, but some especially. Gwen’s image, White-bellied woodstar, Wayquecha, Peru

image:image.image:title: Ellis-Joyce Blog - It’s Worse Than You Think: Please Stop Eating Animals - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: Anyone with a pet knows that animals love to play- just like we do.

image:image.image:title: Ellis-Joyce Blog - The Flywire Minimum Feedback Data Challenge and “The Bitter Lesson”
